jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at RINL
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, RINL in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About RINL:
RINL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RINL!
